debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
l : List (List α)
l1 : List α
idx idx1 : ℕ
hidx : idx < l.length
hidx1 : idx1 < l1.length
⊢ ∃ idx',
    (l.set idx (l1.eraseIdx idx1)).flatten = (l.set idx l1).flatten.eraseIdx ↑idx' ∧
      l1[idx1] = (l.set idx l1).flatten[idx']

proof:
induction idx generalizing l l1 idx1 with
        | zero =>
          cases l with
          | nil => simp at hidx
          | cons hd tl =>
            simp only [List.set_cons_zero, List.flatten_cons]
            exact ⟨⟨idx1, by rw [List.length_append]; omega⟩,
              by simp only [List.eraseIdx_append, show idx1 < l1.length from hidx1, ite_true],
              (List.getElem_append_left hidx1).symm⟩
        | succ idx ih =>
          cases l with
          | nil => simp at hidx
          | cons hd tl =>
            simp only [List.length_cons, Nat.add_lt_add_iff_right] at hidx
            simp only [List.set_cons_succ, List.flatten_cons]
            obtain ⟨idx', h1, h2⟩ := @ih tl l1 idx1 hidx hidx1
            have hlen : hd.length + idx'.1 < (hd ++ (tl.set idx l1).flatten).length := by
              rw [List.length_append]; omega
            refine ⟨⟨hd.length + idx'.1, by rw [List.length_append]; omega⟩, ?_, ?_⟩
            · change hd ++ (tl.set idx (l1.eraseIdx idx1)).flatten =
                     (hd ++ (tl.set idx l1).flatten).eraseIdx (hd.length + idx'.1)
              rw [h1, List.eraseIdx_append]
              split
              · exfalso; omega
              · simp [Nat.add_sub_cancel_left]
            · change l1[idx1] = (hd ++ (tl.set idx l1).flatten)[(hd.length + idx'.1)]'hlen
              rw [List.getElem_append_right (by omega : hd.length ≤ hd.length + idx'.1)]
              simp [Nat.add_sub_cancel_left]
              exact h2
